items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes Philadelphia Flyers 2026 playoff lookahead
items.description:
The Carolina Hurricanes will play the Philadelphia Flyers in the Eastern Conference Second Round.
The Hurricanes advanced by defeating the Ottawa Senators 4-2 in Game 4 at Canadian Tire Centre on Saturday to sweep the best-of-7 series.
The Hurricanes, the No. 1 seed from the Metropolitan Division, will have home-ice

items.headline: Pittsburgh Penguins Philadelphia Flyers game 6 recap April 29 2026
items.description: PHILADELPHIA -- Cam York scored with 2:28 left in overtime, and the Philadelphia Flyers eliminated the Pittsburgh Penguins with a 1-0 win in Game 6 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Xfinity Mobile Arena on Wednesday.

items.headline: Montreal Canadiens Tampa Bay Lightning Game 5 recap April 29 2026
items.description: TAMPA -- Alexandre Texier scored the go-ahead goal early in the third period, lifting the Montreal Canadiens to a 3-2 win against the Tampa Bay Lightning in Game 5 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Benchmark International Arena on Wednesday.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results

items.headline: Jon Gruden hypes up Tampa Bay Lightning fans Game 5
items.description:
Jon Gruden gave Tampa Bay Lightning fans a power surge on Wednesday.
The former Tampa Bay Buccaneers head coach fired up Lightning fans before Game 5 of the Eastern Conference First Round against the Montreal Canadiens at Benchmark International Arena.

items.headline: Flyers Simon Gagne ignites the orange before Game 6
items.description:
Simon Gagne – always a pro at hyping up Philadelphia Flyers fans – did so once again before Wednesday’s crucial matchup against the Pittsburgh Penguins.
The former Flyers forward “ignited the orange” before Game 6 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Xfinity Mobile Arena, joined by team mascot Gritty,

items.headline: PWHL Notebook playoffs begin Thursday with best of 5 semifinals
items.description: With the Professional Women’s Hockey League’s third season underway, NHL.com staff writer Anna Kulesa will be filing a biweekly notebook on all the happenings in the league. Today, a look at the 2026 PWHL Walter Cup Playoffs and the league’s growth this season.

items.headline: Drew Doughty wants to end career with Los Angeles Kings, be captain
items.description:
EL SEGUNDO, Calif. -- Drew Doughty hopes to end his career with the Los Angeles Kings, but the two-time Stanley Cup-winning defenseman has yet to engage in contract discussions with team management.

items.headline: Dallas Stars seek better puck luck against Minnesota Wild in Game 6
items.description:
DALLAS -- The Dallas Stars buy into the notion that frustration is useless during the Stanley Cup Playoffs. Also getting angry, annoyed or just flat out screaming mad, for that matter.

items.headline: Colorado Avalanche rest crucial before 2nd round of NHL Stanley Cup playoffs
items.description:
CENTENNIAL, Colo -- The Colorado Avalanche are waiting to see whether they'll play the Dallas Stars or Minnesota Wild in the Second Round of the Stanley Cup Playoffs after sweeping the Los Angeles Kings to advance.
Until then, they're using whatever time off they have to prepare as best they

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes top line confident offense will show in second round
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- The Carolina Hurricanes have reached the Eastern Conference Second Round, still awaiting their next opponent, despite receiving little offense from their most productive line during the regular season.

items.headline: Minnesota looks to close out Dallas at home
items.description:
ST. PAUL, Minn. -- The Minnesota Wild are one win away from erasing more than a decade of frustration in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
